issues.description: Condition is incomplete. Must check that Leader has {Dressrosa} type, not just that Leader exists on board. Should be: {"type":"LeaderHasType","value":"Dressrosa"}
Target scope is too broad. Should only affect {Dressrosa} type Characters, not all own Characters. Should be: {"scope":"AllOwnCharacters","filter":{"type":"Dressrosa"}}
Duration is incorrect. Rush keyword should apply for the turn the character is played (permanent effect during that turn's actions), not just EndOfTurn. Should be: "Permanent"

suggestedDsl.effectText: If your Leader has the {Dressrosa} type, your {Dressrosa} type Characters can attack Characters on the turn in which they are played.
